reasoning: The FedRAMP CP-2 (5) control focuses on ensuring continuity of mission and business functions, which in Kubernetes can be addressed by configuring PodDisruptionBudgets to prevent voluntary disruptions from affecting critical applications, setting appropriate replica counts for Deployments and StatefulSets to ensure high availability, and enabling node autoscaling to handle increased load or failures.
title: Contingency Plan | Continue Mission and Business Functions
